package rulecoverage

func NegativeUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelper() string {
    ruleID := "updates_with_struct_used_for_patch_without_field_intent_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "PATCH-style repository writes that rely on struct zero-value semantics without explicit field intent."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
